title: nephrodium subconfluens
intro: Nephrodium subconfluens, also known as subconfluent lady fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Matoniaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Nephrodium subconfluens include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cultures, it is used in traditional medicine, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
